prompt:
Theme: Beyond the Gaze

Person/Expression:
A woman in her 20s. Mature and natural body shape. Transparent skin with natural texture. Dark brown medium layered hair, thin see-through bangs. Clean Japanese-style makeup with thin eyeliner and rose-colored cheeks. Calm smile, looking toward the top right of the frame.

Clothing/Pose:
Ivory fine-ribbed long-sleeve cardigan similar to the generated image. Top buttons undone to show decolletage elegantly. Mocha brown high-waisted wrap-style mini skirt. Small black chain shoulder bag on the right shoulder. Right hand holding the strap, left hand naturally on the black escalator handrail. Relaxed shoulders, leaning slightly left.

Background/Light:
Large commercial facility or department store with an elegant atrium. Glass handrails, glossy floors, warm showcase lighting. Escalator flowing from bottom right to the background. Main light is warm indoor lighting from the upper right, creating soft highlights on the face and hair. Natural shadows on the skin and rib-knit texture.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical 4:5. Close-up portrait looking down from a slightly high position. Subject is slightly left of center, framed from waist to upper thighs. Depth created by escalator lines. Smartphone-style photography from a high angle. Focus on face and upper body, background blurred.

Texture/Style:
Realistic Japanese fashion snap. Warm department store lighting, soft skin texture, detailed rib-knit cardigan, leather and metal chain reflections. Urban and elegant shopping mall photography. Color palette of ivory, mocha brown, black, and warm lights.

Negative:
Childlike face, unnatural youthfulness, excessive exposure, vulgar expression, plastic skin, broken clothing details, extra or missing fingers, poor contact with handrails, distorted joints, incorrect perspective, text, logos, watermarks.
